Dominican Republic Real Estate Guides & Market News — Meridian Blog

Expert guides and weekly market briefings on buying, investing, and living in Dominican Republic real estate: Punta Cana, Cap Cana, Las Terrenas, Santo Domingo, Samaná.

  • DR Market Pulse — July 20, 2026: Record Tourism, Steady Rates, and a $1.3B Skyline Bet in Santo Domingo
    Weekly briefing on the Dominican economy and real estate: a record 6.6M visitors in H1, the BCRD holds rates at 5.25%, remittances up 6.7%, and a $1.3B seven-tower megaproject reshapes Santo Domingo’s skyline. (Market Pulse, 2026-07-20)
  • DR Market Pulse — July 2026: Record Investment, Rate Cuts Ahead, and a Building Boom in the East
    Weekly briefing on the Dominican economy and real estate: 4–5% GDP growth, record $5B foreign investment, stable rates at 5.25%, and the new wave of Punta Cana and Cap Cana developments. (Market Pulse, 2026-07-13)
  • How to Buy Property in the Dominican Republic as a Foreigner (2026 Guide)
    A complete step-by-step guide for foreigners buying property in the Dominican Republic — legal process, costs, taxes, timelines, and expert tips. (Buying Guide, 2026-06-22)
  • Dominican Republic Real Estate Investment: Rental Yields & ROI (2026)
    Rental yields of 6–14%, record tourism, and dollar-denominated prices. Is the Dominican Republic the best real estate investment in the Caribbean right now? (Investment, 2026-06-22)
  • Punta Cana vs Cap Cana vs Las Terrenas: Which Is Right for You?
    Comparing the top Dominican Republic real estate markets. Prices, rental yields, lifestyle, and who each location suits best — a complete 2026 guide. (Location Guide, 2026-06-22)
